core_recommendation.dot_represents: one solo model opportunity on one sibling packet
core_recommendation.reasoning: The sibling pair is the visual unit that preserves the ALLOW versus ESCALATE boundary while each dot remains traceable to a concrete model verdict opportunity.

legend.count_rule: count only inside the explicitly selected lane
count only inside the explicitly selected lane
track separately from semantic wrong verdicts

legend.meaning: HoloVerify rescued a solo failure in an internal hardening lane
legend.count_rule: not public denominator evidence unless separately admitted

legend.meaning: HoloVerify failed or failure class remains unpatched
legend.count_rule: link to failure class patch and rerun status

evidence_modes.label: Public blind-120
evidence_modes.warning: This is the only public benchmark denominator.

evidence_modes.label: Solo stress lane
evidence_modes.description: Selected solo failure material and seam discovery.
evidence_modes.warning: Selected for pressure testing; not representative public denominator evidence.

evidence_modes.label: Holo rescue / hardening
evidence_modes.description: Internal HoloVerify repair and rerun evidence.
evidence_modes.warning: Internal hardening evidence only unless separately admitted.

evidence_modes.label: Quarantine
evidence_modes.description: Packet/key defects invalid runs and excluded evidence.
evidence_modes.warning: Excluded from scores and denominator claims.

domain_layout.candidate_or_quarantine_rule: Mark candidate-only or quarantined material separately and do not mix it into public-denominator counts.

toggle_behavior.solo_view: Show all six solo dots per sibling-pair square.
toggle_behavior.holo_view: Keep solo dot positions fixed and add a HoloVerify overlay so rescued red dots and unresolved red dots remain visually traceable.
toggle_behavior.holo_rescued_dot: Convert to green or add a green rescue ring, with internal-only claim boundary.
toggle_behavior.holo_failed_dot: Keep red and link to failure class patch status rerun status and regression fixture status.
toggle_behavior.parse_failure_dot: Keep amber unless the selected lane has a clean admissible rerun; do not silently convert parse failure into semantic correctness.
toggle_behavior.quarantined_dot: Keep gray in every view and suppress score aggregation.

failure_class_taxonomy.definition: Source-open ESCALATE packet is incorrectly allowed.
Source-closed ALLOW packet is incorrectly blocked.
Output cannot be scored as a clean verdict.
A claimed closure does not actually close the source-visible blocker.
No worker or gate detects the required source-field dependency.
Expected answer depends on source-invisible or defective packet/key material.

tooltip_schema.boundary: Internal audit truth or expected source-visible verdict; public views should label this as expected verdict and must not expose hidden labels.

misleading_claim_controls: Never aggregate public blind-120 solo stress Holo rescue and quarantine lanes into one score.
Never hide unresolved Holo failures behind a green aggregate.
Never display answer keys sibling truth shortcuts scoring-map contents or prompt-visible hidden labels.
Keep packet/key defects gray and excluded even if visually useful as cautionary examples.
Use explicit lane labels and denominator badges in every exported image.
claim_boundary_warning_text: This matrix is a failure atlas, not one blended benchmark score. The public denominator is blind-120 only. Solo stress lanes are selected to expose execution-boundary failures. Holo rescue and rerun lanes are internal hardening evidence unless separately admitted. Gray quarantined packets are excluded. Red dots do not mean AI is useless; they show scattered wrong or unusable decisions that are unacceptable at high-stakes execution boundaries.
